PowerShell(foreach\($f in 'pin.js','scroll.js','windowPicker.js','overlay.js'\){ if\(Test-Path $f\){ $c=Get-Content $f -Raw; $hasTheme = $c -match 'getInitialTheme|theme:apply|onThemeApply|applyTheme'; Write-Output "$f : themeHandling=$hasTheme" } else { Write-Output "$f : MISSING" } })

PowerShell($asar = "dist\\win-unpacked\\resources\\app.asar"; $dir = "dist\\win-unpacked\\resources\\app"; if\(Test-Path $asar\){ Write-Output "ASAR present: $asar"; Write-Output \(\(Get-Item $asar\).LastWriteTime\) } elseif\(Test-Path $dir\){ Write-Output "Unpacked app dir present"; if\(Test-Path "$dir\\editor.js"\){ $c=Get-Content "$dir\\editor.js" -Raw; Write-Output \("editor.js has getInitialTheme init: " + \($c -match 'getInitialTheme'\)\) } } else { Get-ChildItem dist\\win-unpacked\\resources -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell(Write-Output \("source editor.js LastWrite: " + \(Get-Item editor.js\).LastWriteTime\); $node="node_modules\\.bin\\asar.cmd"; if\(Test-Path $node\){ & $node extract-file "dist\\win-unpacked\\resources\\app.asar" editor.js "$env:TEMP\\pkg_editor.js"; if\(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\pkg_editor.js"\){ $c=Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\pkg_editor.js" -Raw; Write-Output \("PACKAGED editor.js has getInitialTheme: " + \($c -match 'getInitialTheme'\)\); Write-Output \("PACKAGED applyTheme call in init: " + \($c -match 'applyTheme\\\(await'\)\) } } else { Write-Output "asar bin not found; trying node require"; node -e "const asar=require\('asar'\);const b=asar.extractFile\('dist/win-unpacked/resources/app.asar','editor.js'\).toString\(\);console.log\('has getInitialTheme:', /getInitialTheme/.test\(b\)\);console.log\('has applyTheme\(await:', /applyTheme\\\(await/.test\(b\)\)" })
